case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. REDOLFO BARONIA

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100117205)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-06-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-08-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-09-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
